strategies.name: Fortress Home vs Road Struggler
strategies.rationale: A home side averaging over 2 points per home game hosting a visitor who earns under 1 point on the road represents a structural form edge that markets systematically underweight when implied home probability sits below 60%.

strategies.name: Leaky Defenses Open-Goals Clash
strategies.rationale: A prolific home attack meeting a defensively porous away side in a fixture with a high-scoring H2H history creates compounding goal probability that over-2.5 lines routinely fail to reflect.

strategies.name: Deadlock Derby Draw Hunter
strategies.rationale: Rivalries where over a third of meetings end level, the home side is not dominant at home, and the away team is competent on the road produce draws at a rate the market's draw price undervalues.

strategies.name: Home Fortress Dominance
strategies.rationale: Back strong home sides with elite home points-per-game against visitors who consistently fail to pick up points on the road, exploiting venue-specific form divergence.

strategies.name: Defensive Stalemate Under 2.5
strategies.rationale: When both teams are low-scorers in recent form AND their head-to-head history is historically tight, the structural goal expectation is well below the 2.5 line.

strategies.name: Draw Value in Balanced Fixtures
strategies.rationale: Exploit market mispricing of draws when historical H2H draw frequency exceeds the market's implied probability and neither team holds a meaningful form advantage.

strategies.name: Fortress Home vs Road-Weary Visitor
strategies.rationale: Backs a team with dominant home-specific form against a side that consistently struggles on the road, exploiting venue-specific performance gaps the market tends to underweight relative to aggregate form.

strategies.name: High-Octane Goal Fest
strategies.rationale: Targets fixtures where both sides carry genuine attacking threat in their respective venues and the head-to-head history independently confirms a pattern of high-scoring encounters, creating structural over-2.5 value.

strategies.name: Deadlock Draw — Underpriced Stalemate
strategies.rationale: Exploits bookmaker mispricing of draws in historically stalemate-prone rivalries where current form confirms a genuinely balanced contest, capturing the systematic market tendency to overestimate the probability of a decisive outcome.

strategies.name: Home Fortress vs Travelling Weakness
strategies.rationale: A home side in dominant home form hosting a team that consistently fails on the road creates a structural edge the market systematically underweights when it anchors too heavily on overall form rather than venue-split form.

strategies.name: Prolific Clash Goal Fest
strategies.rationale: When both sides are independently prolific in their own role and their head-to-head history confirms an open-game pattern, the probability of 3+ goals is structurally higher than the market prices.

strategies.name: H2H Draw Magnet Market Mismatch
strategies.rationale: Evenly matched rivals with a high historical draw frequency become a positive-EV draw bet when the market underprices the draw below its true base rate, exploiting the bookmaker tendency to overshorten both sides at the expense of the draw.
